children.text: conduct local asthma surveillance activities to collect data on the prevalence and severity of asthma and the quality of asthma management;
compile and annually publish data on the prevalence of children suffering from asthma in each State; and
to the extent practicable, compile and publish data on the childhood mortality rate associated with asthma nationally.

children.heading: Surveillance activities
children.label: b Surveillance activities
children.text: The Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, acting through the representative of the Director on the National Asthma Education Prevention Program Coordinating Committee, shall, in carrying out subsection (a), provide an update on surveillance activities at each Committee meeting.

children.heading: Collaborative efforts
children.label: c Collaborative efforts
children.text: The activities described in subsection (a)(1) may be conducted in collaboration with eligible entities awarded a grant under .section 280g of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this section, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2001 through 2005.
